decisions.decision: Switch harness --remote-user from `root` default to empty (defer to ssh-config kevin@cake-shaper)
decisions.rationale: harness already wraps remote sqlite3 in `sudo -n` — root SSH was gratuitous and broke under cron without an agent

decisions.decision: Capture ATTEMPTED_AT_UTC once at script start; use in both success-path and ERR-trap partial-summary JSON writes
decisions.rationale: fixes (a) success path recording json-write time as 'attempt time' and (b) ERR-trap path dropping timestamp entirely

decisions.decision: ATTEMPT-LOG helper uses upsert semantics (not append-once)
decisions.rationale: Plan 198-06 MEDIUM-8 requires idempotent updates; append-once goes stale after mark_retry mutates JSON

decisions.decision: Strict input-derived attempt numbering (JSON attempt_number or dirname); refuse on mismatch
decisions.rationale: max-existing+1 misnumbers out-of-order backfills; helper must derive N from authoritative source

decisions.decision: Three-source timestamp resolution: JSON attempted_at_utc, then start_utc alias, then harness log filename, then 'unknown'
decisions.rationale: harness historically wrote attempted_at_utc; legacy callers may use start_utc; backfill of yesterday's 4-6 needs filename-derived timestamps

decisions.decision: Schedule via systemd --user with persistent unit files (not transient `at` or `systemd-run` defaults)
decisions.rationale: transient units in /run wipe on reboot; persistent files in ~/.config/systemd/user/ survive

decisions.decision: Timer Persistent=false (do not catch up on missed firings)
decisions.rationale: if dev is off at 02:30 and boots at 09:00, late firing would bash production WAN during business traffic

decisions.decision: Skip remote /schedule agent for tomorrow's check-in
decisions.rationale: .planning/ is gitignored; remote agent has no access to ATTEMPT-LOG. Use local /gsd-progress instead

next_action: Tomorrow morning, run `/gsd-progress` to surface attempt 7's verdict from ATTEMPT-LOG. If PASS, route to Plan 198-07. If FAIL, decide retry-vs-abort.
context_notes: Three Codex stop-time review iterations refined the upsert helper before commit. Scheduled timer fires Fri 2026-05-01 02:30 CDT. Pre-existing drift in working tree is unrelated and out of scope for 198-06.
